set -eu
cd '/root/family10h_spatial_discovery_20260722_104917_bfirst_relation_only_repeat/source'
chmod +x relation_spatial_runtime relation_spatial_pmu_preflight || true
mkdir -p _relation_spatial_owned_outputs
for c in 4 5; do
  g=/sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu${c}/cpufreq/scaling_governor
  if [ -f "$g" ]; then echo performance > "$g" || true; cat "$g"; fi
done > DISCOVERY_CPU_GOVERNORS.txt
/usr/bin/taskset -c 4 true
/usr/bin/taskset -c 5 true
./relation_spatial_pmu_preflight --disabled-group-preflight 4 > DISCOVERY_PMU_PREFLIGHT.json
if [ -e '/root/family10h_spatial_discovery_20260722_104917_bfirst_relation_only_repeat/source/_relation_spatial_owned_outputs/bfirst_relation_only_repeat' ]; then echo preexisting_output_root >&2; exit 12; fi
